brand_story: Empowering students to secure intellectual property. A prestigious, authoritative platform for filing Indian design and utility patents, opening doors to higher studies and research internships.

rules: Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em])
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body

admin_dashboard.alignment: Strict hierarchy, full utilization of pixels

rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8)
Optical alignment over geometrical (pad icons on left)
No centering disease: favor asymmetry or strong left alignment

surfaces_and_components.cards_dashboard: Flat Solid or Grid Borders style. 1px border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast text. Hover state must explicitly define text color.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Input/Select fields left-aligned, clear focus states (ring-2 ring-primary).
surfaces_and_components.borders: Use subtle 1px borders (border-border/40) for grid dividers.
surfaces_and_components.radius: rounded-sm or rounded-none to maintain Swiss/Technical aesthetic.

icons_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based)

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D rendering of a glowing patent document. Use as hero background with bg-white/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

certificate_showcase.description: Mockup of the recognized certificate of filing for completing the patent process.

students_collaboration.description: Diverse group of students collaborating. Use in 'Benefits of Patents' or 'Research Internships' section.

university_campus.description: Modern university campus. Use in the 'About Collaborators / KIIT University' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Hybrid App: Marketing Landing Page + Admin Dashboard.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the Marketing Page to allow creative asymmetrical bento layouts. Avoid wrapping standard sections in Shadcn cards.
Use Shadcn UI components for the Admin Dashboard and the Student Application Form.
NEVER use placeholder images. ONLY use the URLs provided in the media_and_images section.
Add data-testid to every button, form input, and interactive link.
Avoid centering everything. Use left-aligned text with strong typographic hierarchy.
